description: Black floral printed backpack with branding and a flap on the front that has mock buckles and magnetic closureTwo padded adjustable shoulder straps and a short haul loopOne main compartment with drawstring and internal compartmentBellow pocket in front with flap that has mock buckles and magnetic closureA bellow pocket on each side with flap that has mock buckles and magnetic closureSynthetic lining with zippered compartment and mobile slotLegs at the base
